task_snapshots.title: 334b-05: Cost calculation model & projection
task_snapshots.description:
[subtask of eb03f5696c69]

## Task
Build cost tracking and projection model in src/bernstein/core/models.py

## Requirements
- Per-agent cost accumulation (sum by agent_id)
- Per-model cost breakdown (track GPT-4, Claude, etc.)
- Run projection algorithm (estimate run end costs)
- Cost persistence to .sdd/metrics/
- Handle zero/missing budget gracefully

## Completion
✓ Agent costs correctly accumulated
✓ Per-model breakdown accurate
✓ Projection estimates within 10% variance
✓ Cost data persists and recovers correctly
